notes: See bundle-budgets.README.md for methodology, exclusions, and update procedure. Each entry's `rationale` field documents the per-entry headroom math and dominant symbols at a specific commit.

..rationale: re-anchored after intentional public seam/runtime export expansion; measured 975 B gzip @ v0.33.0 release verification; headroom max(ceil(975*1.2)=1170, 975+50=1025) -> 1170 (1.2x dominates)

./auth.rationale: auth surface — SessionManager, TokenStore, PermissionResolver, GoodVibesAuthClient (createMemoryTokenStore, createBrowserTokenStore, createGoodVibesAuthClient); AutoRefreshOptions/AutoRefreshCoordinatorOptions types only (the AutoRefreshCoordinator class and createAutoRefreshMiddleware live in ./client-auth and are NOT re-exported from ./auth). Measured 2882 B gzip @ commit c0e5910; headroom max(ceil(2882*1.2)=3459, 2882+50=2932) → 3459 (1.2x dominates by 527 B).
